body.title: Replace remaining utility closet string references with rack server
body.result: replaced all utility closet string refs with rack server in log messages, docstrings, comments, and HTML; fixed stale test_adc_shim assertion
body.description:
27 string references to 'utility closet'/'utility_closet' remain in source code after the D335 rename to 'rack server'. Pure string replacement in log messages, docstrings, and comments — no behavior change.

**Affected files:** devices/web_server/server.py (~2 refs), devices/igor/web/adc_client.py (~15 refs), devices/igor/cognition/SUBSYSTEMS.md (1 ref), devices/igor/memory/cortex.py (1 ref), lab/claudecode/cc_queue.py (check for more). Run: grep -rn 'utility.closet\|utility_closet' devices/ lab/ --include='*.py' to get full list.
**Design rules:** none
**Scope boundary:** IN — rename string literals only (log messages, docstrings, comments, variable names where they are internal); OUT — do not rename DB column names or external API paths without a separate ticket
**Test plan:** grep -rn 'utility.closet\|utility_closet' devices/ lab/ --include='*.py' returns 0 hits after fix; pytest passes
